archetype_reasoning: Virtually every visible trade involves buying NO at 0.93-0.999 or YES at 0.978+, i.e. near-certainty positions collecting tiny premiums on highly improbable outcomes. Directionality of 1.0 confirms no genuine two-sided forecasting. Despite 42 resolved trades across 20 markets, the pattern is systematic yield extraction — selling risk on extreme long-shots — rather than forecasting contested outcomes.
domain_blindspots: Trump_US: 53% accuracy on 30 trades suggests near-random outcomes, likely because near-certainty trades occasionally misfire when mispriced; Russia_UKR and Europe too thin to assess
domain_summary: This trader has no identifiable genuine forecasting edge — the near-certainty entry strategy inflates win rates mechanically but delivers negligible PnL ($0.65 total). Domain labels are largely irrelevant because the signal comes from price extremity, not domain insight.
signal_weight_reasoning: All positions are entered at prices where the outcome is already near-certain (0.93–0.999). There is zero informational content about contested probabilities; this trader is harvesting basis points, not forecasting. Copying these signals would expose STR-003 to catastrophic tail risk on the rare misfires, for almost no expected return.
behavioural_flags: Exclusively trades at near-certainty prices (NO at 0.93-0.999 or YES at 0.978+)
Directionality of exactly 1.0 — never takes the opposite side of a market
Multiple simultaneous positions on the same market at marginally different prices suggest systematic sweep or DCA into near-zero-risk positions
Small position sizes (25-150 shares) consistent with yield harvesting rather than conviction sizing
Many open positions in distant-future markets (2028 elections) where liquidity is thin and mispricing risk is elevated
Realized PnL of $0.65 on 42 trades is negligibly small — confirms near-zero-edge strategy

open_positions_summary: Trader holds 15 open NO positions on low-probability political candidates (2028 US presidential candidates including Youngkin, Cooper, Gallego, Oprah, Tucker Carlson, Harris; French 2027 election; Peruvian 2026 election) all priced at 0.91-0.998. The implied thesis is simply 'these individuals will not win' — a structurally sound but informationally vacuous set of bets. The Kamala Harris NO at 0.935 and Marco Rubio NO at 0.91 are the only positions with slightly less extreme certainty, introducing modest tail risk.
watch_items: Monitor whether any open 2028 positions reprice significantly — a candidate gaining traction (e.g. Kamala Harris) could turn profitable NO at 0.935 into a loss
Track if the trader ever enters positions below 0.90 — would signal a change toward genuine forecasting
Watch for any large sizing changes that would shift this from yield harvesting to conviction sizing
Monitor Roberto Sánchez Palomino (Peruvian election, resolves 2026-06-07) — the least extreme open position at 0.938
summary: This trader is a pure yield harvester with no detectable forecasting signal: every trade is placed at near-certainty prices (0.93-0.999), generating a total realized PnL of $0.65 across 42 trades. The 1.0 directionality score confirms this is a one-strategy operation — collecting small premiums on politically improbable outcomes — not genuine geopolitical prediction. Occasional losses on sub-1% outcomes confirm meaningful tail exposure embedded in the strategy. This trader's positioning carries zero informational value for STR-003 signal generation and should be fully excluded from the intelligence feed.
